content:
Given the undirected dynamic graph with the edges:
[(2, 5, 0), (2, 9, 0), (5, 8, 1), (5, 6, 2), (2, 8, 3), (4, 9, 5), (7, 8, 6), (4, 8, 9), (1, 2, 11), (6, 7, 11), (0, 4, 12), (0, 8, 13), (3, 8, 13), (1, 7, 15), (4, 7, 16), (0, 1, 17), (7, 9, 18), (3, 7, 19)],

We need to find the nodes linked with node 4 exactly at time 5.

After scanning all edges, we find that there is a match:
Edge (2, 5, 0) has node 2 and time 0. -> Add node 5.
Edge (5, 8, 1) has node 5 and time 1. -> Add node 8.
Edge (5, 6, 2) has node 5 and time 2. -> Add node 6.
Edge (4, 9, 5) has node 4 and time 5. -> Add node 9.
Edge (7, 8, 6) has node 7 and time 6. -> Add node 8.
Edge (4, 8, 9) has node 4 and time 9. -> Add node 8.
Edge (1, 2, 11) has node 1 and time 11. -> Add node 2.
Edge (6, 7, 11) has node 6 and time 11. -> Add node 7.
Edge (0, 4, 12) has node 0 and time 12. -> Add node 4.
Edge (0, 8, 13) has node 0 and time 13. -> Add node 8.
Edge (3, 8, 13) has node 3 and time 13. -> Add node 8.
Edge (1, 7, 15) has node 1 and time 15. -> Add node 7.
Edge (4, 7, 16) has node 4 and time 16. -> Add node 7.
Edge (0, 1, 17) has node 0 and time 17. -> Add node 1.
Edge (7, 9, 18) has node 7 and time 18. -> Add node 9.
Edge (3, 7, 19) has node 3 and time 19. -> Add node 7.

The nodes matched are 5, 8, 6, 9, 7, 8, 2, 7, 1, 8, 11, 15, 16, 17, 18, and 19.

Answer: [5, 8, 6, 9, 7, 8, 2, 7, 1, 8, 11, 15, 16, 17, 18, 19]
